faqs.question: How can I get admission at Dr. K.N. Modi University?
faqs.answer: Admission to Dr. K.N. Modi University is offered based on merit and entrance. Candidates must visit the official website of the University to apply for the candidature. Furthermore, candidates must fill out the application form through the official website. After a successful application submission, candidates will be shortlisted based on the eligibility criteria. For final admission, candidates must pay the fees and confirm the seat.

college_info.intro: Dr. KN Modi University offers courses at the UG and PG levels in full-time mode. Courses such as BSc, BTech, and BA are some of the popular ones among the candidates. Admission to the same is offered based on merit and would require candidates to secure a minimum aggregate in Class 12 along with valid scores in accepted entrance exams. Furthermore, the course curriculum provided by the faculty is designed considering various industry standards and norms. fees_and_eligibility.overview: Dr. K.N. Modi University offers courses at the UG, PG, and Diploma levels in full-time mode. Admission to the respective courses is offered based on merit and entrance. Therefore, candidates must secure a minimum aggregate in Class 12 and graduation to seek admission in UG and PG level courses. In addition to this, candidates must secure valid scores in accepted entrance exams as suggested by the University. admission_overview.college_name: Dr. K.N. Modi University Course Admission 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Selection Process

admission_overview.title: Dr. K.N. Modi University, Modinagar Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: Dr. K.N. Modi University Modinagar admission 2025 is both merit and entrance-based for both undergraduate and postgraduate courses. Students can enrol by applying online at the official website of the university. The university accepts applicants based on their performance in the last qualifying exam. Dr. K.N. Modi University Modinagar, offers a variety of undergraduate and postgraduate courses in the fields of Engineering, Technology, Management, Nursing, and more. Additionally, students can also pursue diploma courses at the university.

eligibility_selection.title: Dr. K.N. Modi University, Modinagar Eligibility & Selection 2025
eligibility_selection.description: Dr. K.N. Modi University Modinagar, course admission is subject to the preset admission criteria. Candidates looking to enrol in the UG courses offered at the university need to pass Class 12 from a recognised board. Similarly, PG admissions require students to complete their graduation. Students must fulfil both the admission criteria of the desired course. The table below showcases the eligibility and selection criteria for popular Dr. K.N. Modi University, Modinagar courses:

admission_process.title: Dr. K.N. Modi University, Modinagar Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: The admission procedure for Dr. K.N. Modi University Modinagar, includes several steps from application to selection, followed by admission confirmation. Candidates interested in joining the university can apply online for the desired course at the official website of the university. Students can first check whether they satisfy the admission criteria of the course they seek to join. Eligible students can follow the steps listed below to complete the Dr. K.N. Modi University, Modinagar admission process:
Step 1: Application Process

Interested candidates can apply for the desired programme by visiting the official website of the university and filling out the application form. To submit the form, students must provide the required information and documents along with paying the application fees.
Step 2: Selection Process

Students are shortlisted based on their academic performance along with CAT /XAT/ MAT/ CMAT /RMAT scores for the MBA programme, and for the remaining courses, selection is done based on merit of last qualifying exam taken. The university may conduct further selection rounds, such as personal interviews, if it deems it necessary.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation
Once an admission offer is made, selected students need to pay the admission fees to secure their spot at the university.

courses_data.description: Dr. K.N. Modi University provides BTech in Automobile, Civil, Computer Science, Electrical & Electronics, and Mechanical Engineering. Merit or recognized entrance exams approved by the university are considered for selection.

reviews_list.review_title: The best college from my experience.

review_content.Placements: St. Philomena's College has a dedicated placement cell that works to facilitate job opportunities for its students. Half of the college students will be placed in many companies. Coming companies - Modal, Infosys, Concentrix, Wipro, and so many companies will visit our campus. Coming to the package it depends on the company standards. I think it does not exceed 3 lacs.
review_content.Infrastructure: Students will be asked to undertake project work every sem. Including the college projects under the guidance of professors giving more practical knowledge. We have not taken for the industrial visits which would beat next semester. We have 6 sharing rooms and it has bunker beds along with attached bathrooms and food is provided 24/7. Mostly the food there is South Indian and it is okay-ish. Currently, I stay in PG the PG room is good all facilities are provided and the food is good and homely.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Philomena was a very wide campus, neat and clean.

review_content.Placements: Some of the startup companies arrived at college for providing students with internships. They selected students, but there was no stipend. They hired on the basis of their criteria, like percentage and the skill set required. Campus interviews were undertaken very rarely, and some students got selected in campus interviews.
review_content.Infrastructure: Along with studies, co-curriculum activities were conducted. Talents day and annual college day were the best celebrations. In the talents day programme, we had to show our hidden talents, which was very fun. And speaking of the library, it was also loaded with lots of different modes of book collection. Throw ball, volleyball, kabaddi, and many other sports were conducted during sports day.

reviews_list.review_title: It is the best college to join because of cultural activities, sports, and studies.

review_content.Placements: Around 90 students got placed in the B.Com course. B.Com has the lowest fee structure around Rs. 46,000 - Rs. 55,000. The BCA course fee is Rs. 70,000. It is costly. American companies recruit students abroad. Our college offers courses like B.Com, BBA, BCA, B.A, B.Voc, B.Sc. in forensic science, and others.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our college, there are more than 20 departments. Our college has one of the ancient libraries with a lot of book collections. Classrooms have projectors. The food quality is always good. We have a medical checkup once a year. Our college provides more importance on sports.

content.Placements: They had the best placement cell. Every year, interviews from various MNCs and other companies were conducted for the passing out students, and they were assisted by the college for their success. Companies were highly reputed and followed strict rules and regulations while choosing their employees. They arrived at our college during the month of December, conducted interviews, and gave the list of selected candidates, who then joined their company after their graduation.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities in the hostel included broadband internet access, housekeeping, dry cleaning, and laundry services. Hostels also provided a neat and green environment with sports facilities for students to relax and enjoy their stay. Hostels had mess facilities at subsidized rates where students can enjoy nutritious and hygienic food.

content.Placements: We had many companies assigned to our college. There were many reputed ones. The highest-paying companies came for job placements and summer internships. Some companies that came last year were JP Morgan, UBS, RBS, Credit Suisse, American Express, MasterCard, Experian, Deloitte, Bajaj Finserv, Nomura, and many more. The stipend ranged from Rs.50,000 to 1.2 Lakh per month, and the final placements paid between 10 and 31 LPA.

individual_reviews.title: The best college from my experience.

content.Placements: St. Philomena's College has a dedicated placement cell that works to facilitate job opportunities for its students. Half of the college students will be placed in many companies. Coming companies - Modal, Infosys, Concentrix, Wipro, and so many companies will visit our campus. Coming to the package it depends on the company standards. I think it does not exceed 3 lacs.
content.Infrastructure: Students will be asked to undertake project work every sem. Including the college projects under the guidance of professors giving more practical knowledge. We have not taken for the industrial visits which would beat next semester. We have 6 sharing rooms and it has bunker beds along with attached bathrooms and food is provided 24/7. Mostly the food there is South Indian and it is okay-ish. Currently, I stay in PG the PG room is good all facilities are provided and the food is good and homely.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Philomena was a very wide campus, neat and clean.

content.Placements: Some of the startup companies arrived at college for providing students with internships. They selected students, but there was no stipend. They hired on the basis of their criteria, like percentage and the skill set required. Campus interviews were undertaken very rarely, and some students got selected in campus interviews.
content.Infrastructure: Along with studies, co-curriculum activities were conducted. Talents day and annual college day were the best celebrations. In the talents day programme, we had to show our hidden talents, which was very fun. And speaking of the library, it was also loaded with lots of different modes of book collection. Throw ball, volleyball, kabaddi, and many other sports were conducted during sports day.

individual_reviews.title: It is the best college to join because of cultural activities, sports, and studies.

content.Placements: Around 90 students got placed in the B.Com course. B.Com has the lowest fee structure around Rs. 46,000 - Rs. 55,000. The BCA course fee is Rs. 70,000. It is costly. American companies recruit students abroad. Our college offers courses like B.Com, BBA, BCA, B.A, B.Voc, B.Sc. in forensic science, and others.
content.Infrastructure: In our college, there are more than 20 departments. Our college has one of the ancient libraries with a lot of book collections. Classrooms have projectors. The food quality is always good. We have a medical checkup once a year. Our college provides more importance on sports.
